added.description: Added investigationResults to TriageDecision serialization to prevent data loss
Added balanced bracket-counting JSON extraction replacing indexOf("{")
Added logging/comments to 22 empty catch blocks across 13 files

changed.description: Aligned agent output paths with investigate.dart read paths via resultsDir
Deduplicated kCiConfigFiles and kStage1Artifacts into ci_constants.dart
Centralized temporary paths via kStagingDir constant (env-overridable)
Used config.triagedLabel and config.releaseNotesPath instead of hardcoded values in verify.dart and link.dart
Replaced Ruby YAML validation with package:yaml in validate_command
Replaced exit(1) with GeminiPrerequisiteError exceptions in gemini_utils
Threw FormatException on unknown agent type instead of silent fallback

fixed.description: Replaced firstWhere+.first fallback with firstOrNull+skip to prevent wrong-issue processing in investigate.dart and cross_repo_link.dart
Replaced greedy regex with bracket-counting JSON extraction
